mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fixtures (id, league_id, season, round, home_team_id, away_team_id, home_score, away_score, status, elapsed, match_time, referee, venue, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{leagueId}, #{season}, #{round}, #{homeTeamId}, #{awayTeamId}, #{homeScore}, #{awayScore}, #{status}, #{elapsed}, #{matchTime}, #{referee}, #{venue}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})

INSERT INTO fixtures (id, league_id, season, round, home_team_id, away_team_id, home_score, away_score, status, elapsed, match_time, referee, venue, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{leagueId}, #{season}, #{round}, #{homeTeamId}, #{awayTeamId}, #{homeScore}, #{awayScore}, #{status}, #{elapsed}, #{matchTime}, #{referee}, #{venue}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE league_id = VALUES(league_id), season = VALUES(season), round = VALUES(round), home_team_id = VALUES(home_team_id), away_team_id = VALUES(away_team_id), home_score = VALUES(home_score), away_score = VALUES(away_score), status = VALUES(status), elapsed = VALUES(elapsed), match_time = VALUES(match_time), referee = VALUES(referee), venue = VALUES(venue), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.update:
UPDATE fixtures
league_id = #{leagueId},
season = #{season},
round = #{round},
home_team_id = #{homeTeamId},
away_team_id = #{awayTeamId},
match_time = #{matchTime},
referee = #{referee},
venue = #{venue},
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE fixtures
home_score = #{homeScore}, away_score = #{awayScore},
elapsed = #{elapsed},
status = #{status},
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}
